signal: 记忆整合 cron (320cca06) failed with 'Edit: in SOUL.md (26 chars) failed'. Root cause: consolidation agent tried to add content that already existed in SOUL.md (2026-03-18 反思 section). Idempotent edit failure — the desired content is present, but the cron reported error.
action: Cron prompt updated: added edit idempotency + read-before-edit + one retry on oldText mismatch. Goal: avoid turning no-op SOUL.md updates into cron errors.

Thread归档 cron agent reads SKILL.md from wrong path. 84 ENOENT errors over 3 days. Root cause: cron prompt with lightContext:true, agent can't parse available_skills and guesses wrong path.
action: Updated cron prompt to use explicit path.
